<findings>

[observation] [info] High cohesion (0.95) — files are tightly interconnected
[observation] [info] Author runbooks illustrating interactions between lifecycle components like `agent/index.ts`, `lifecycle/cli-loop.ts`, and `process/exec-shell.ts` to streamline onboarding.
[observation] [info] Create interface-focused tests for the exported schemas (`schema/index.ts`, `schema/v1.ts`, `types/index.ts`) so consumer packages detect breaking changes immediately.
[observation] [info] Modularize the analysis submodules (adaptive/review/workflow) with a registry to keep the growing strategy set manageable.

</findings>

<insights>

- High cohesion (0.95) — files are tightly interconnected
- Stabilize numerous entrypoints (`schema`, `types`, tooling) with contract tests to ensure downstream SDKs stay in sync.
- Isolate heavy analysis modules (adaptive/review/workflow) behind clear interfaces so new strategies plug in cleanly.
- Pay down documentation debt by mapping how lifecycle pieces (`cli-loop`, `completion`, `process/exec-shell.ts`) cooperate during runs.
- Create interface-focused tests for the exported schemas (`schema/index.ts`, `schema/v1.ts`, `types/index.ts`) so consumer packages detect breaking changes immediately.
- Modularize the analysis submodules (adaptive/review/workflow) with a registry to keep the growing strategy set manageable.
- Author runbooks illustrating interactions between lifecycle components like `agent/index.ts`, `lifecycle/cli-loop.ts`, and `process/exec-shell.ts` to streamline onboarding.
- [call graph] 1887 internal calls, 2 outgoing, 27 incoming (cohesion: 1, coupling: 0)

</insights>
